Brilliance
Top bar Identity lockup at top-left. Tappable to a Settings > About sheet that shows the full lockup.
Brilli dot Bottom-left of liquid-nav. Pulses softly during idle. Flashes on automation completion.
Liquid-nav Sidebar doesn't exist on mobile. The pill is the equivalent surface. Six tabs. Same as today, no rearrangement.
v33.0 mobile preview

Chat

This is a placeholder for the chat view to demonstrate the rebranded chrome around it. The actual chat experience is unchanged. Brilli appears in the chat landing per the desktop spec.

What changed on mobile

Top bar reads "Brilliance" with the existing app icon. The liquid-nav at the bottom gains a Brilli status dot at the left edge - the only new affordance. Six tabs unchanged in order, label, or icon.

What did NOT change

Tab order. Tab icons. Active-tab gold underline. Backdrop blur. Pill width. Safe-area insets. Existing scroll-padding rules. The keyboard-close reflow hack stays per CLAUDE.md.

Settings > About

The full "Brilliance, Intelligence OS by RoweOS" lockup lives there on mobile. Reachable from Settings or by tapping the top bar identity.

Brilli · Automation complete
Chat Pulse Studio Bloom ID More
